payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Partial edge-cropped dark brown wooden nightstand top with a glossy veneer finish and beveled front edge; only the front corner and top surface are visible, showing minor surface scuffs and subtle reflections, approximately 0.7 m from the camera.
